Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.Marshaller

Packages that use Marshaller
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller
Convenience marshallers pairing RDF serializers and parsers into single classes with fluent to/from methods.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API

    class 
    Sse
    Pairs SseSerializer and SseParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods for the text/event-stream wire format.

    StreamMarshaller
    A subclass of Marshaller for stream-based serializers and parsers.
